summary: Frontend-only verification of 5 legal/compliance pages, Landing footer, Privacy Settings interactivity (anon + signed-in), and mobile responsiveness. All requested behaviors verified successfully — no blocking issues.

tests_executed.landing_footer: All 6 required footer testids found (footer-terms, footer-privacy, footer-cookie-policy, footer-acceptable-use, footer-privacy-settings, footer-security).
tests_executed.privacy_policy: Routes /privacy-policy AND /privacy alias both render. H1 = 'Privacy Policy'. document.title = 'Privacy Policy · aiclonechats.com'. meta[name=description] present (139 chars). Identity/deepfake alert present. Numbered sections (account data, AI-generated, payments, cookies, deletion, children, retention, security) present. Related cross-link nav present.
tests_executed.terms: Routes /terms-of-service AND /terms alias both render. H1 = 'Terms of Service'. doc.title and meta description set. All 13+ required sections present (acceptance, eligibility, user content, impersonation, AI, payments, refund, prohibited, IP, termination, liability, governing law). Identity-content danger alert present.
tests_executed.cookie_policy: /cookie-policy renders. H1, doc.title, meta description set. essential/auth/payment/analytics keywords present. Direct link to /privacy-settings present. Related nav present.
tests_executed.security: /security renders. H1, doc.title, meta description set. Sections for account protection, secure payments, encryption, media protection, abuse, vulnerability present. SECURITY mailto link (mailto:admin@aiclonechats.com?subject=SECURITY) present.
tests_executed.privacy_settings_anonymous: Page renders. Sign-in alert visible. All 5 data-action buttons (download, delete-media, delete-outputs, delete-account, logout) are DISABLED. Cookie toggles for analytics + marketing are clickable, aria-checked flips to true, persisted to localStorage key 'aicc_cookie_prefs_v1' as {"analytics":true,"marketing":true}, and survive page reload.
tests_executed.privacy_settings_signed_in: Login with sr-tester@example.com / TestPass123! succeeded → redirected to /dashboard, session_token in localStorage. On /privacy-settings: sign-in alert is GONE; all 5 action buttons are ENABLED. Clicking 'Request export' triggers success toast: 'Opening email client. We respond within 30 days.' confirming handleDownload (which builds the prefilled mailto with subject 'Data export request — sr-tester@example.com') executed.
tests_executed.mobile_responsiveness: Viewport 375x800: /privacy-policy and /privacy-settings both render with scrollWidth == clientWidth (375px). No horizontal overflow, layout intact.
tests_executed.cross_link_nav: Related-links footer block (Privacy Policy, Terms, Cookie Policy, Privacy Settings, Security, Acceptable Use) confirmed on every legal page via nav[aria-label='Legal documents'].

notes: Mailto interception in browser could not be programmatically captured (window.location.href setter is restricted), but the success toast firing after handleDownload click confirms the code path including emailRequest() ran. Visual smoke-test screenshot shows page renders correctly.
Console shows 401s from /api/auth/me when not signed in — this is normal AuthProvider bootstrap behavior on public pages, not a regression from this feature.

Substring search for 'uploaded media' / 'third part' / 'user tips' returned false in body text but only because the pages phrase these as 'media you upload', 'third-party services' (with hyphen), and 'Tips for safer use' — the required topical coverage is present (verified manually in code).
critical_code_review_comments: LegalPage.jsx is reusable and clean; document.title + meta description are set via useEffect with proper deps.
PrivacySettings.jsx correctly gates each handler with a !user guard AND disables the button visually — defense in depth.
Cookie prefs JSON is wrapped in try/catch for both load and save — robust against corrupted localStorage.
Minor: window.confirm() used for delete-account is acceptable for an MVP mailto flow, but consider a styled modal for visual consistency with the rest of the dark/premium aesthetic.
test_credentials: sr-tester@example.com / TestPass123! (verified — login succeeds, session_token set, /dashboard reachable).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 legal pages + Privacy Settings (anon + signed-in) + Landing footer + mobile responsiveness verified end-to-end with Playwright. Re-test only needed if E1 touches LegalPage.jsx, PrivacySettings.jsx, Landing footer block, or App.js routes for these paths.
